name: Build No. 260031
body:
CI test build
at commit [`89004124a5`](https://github.com/eden-emulator/mirror/compare/..89004124a55a5ce8c45a90dcb60afd8a107238c3).


# Packages

## Targets

Each build is optimized for a specific architecture and uses a specific compiler.

- **aarch64/arm64**: For devices that use the armv8-a instruction set; e.g. Snapdragon X, all Android devices, and Apple Silicon Macs.
- **amd64**: For devices that use the amd64 (aka x86_64) instruction set; this is exclusively used by Intel and AMD CPUs and is only found on desktops.
- **v3**: For devices that use the x86_64-v3 instruction set or newer; this is found on Ryzen, Intel 4th Generation (Haswell), and newer.

### PGO

PGO builds usually perform ~10-30% better than standard builds, and are thus generally recommended for all users.

## Android

| Build  | Notes |
|--------|-------|
| [ChromeOS/x86](https://github.com/sharath-5br2r/my-patched-apks/releases/download/260031/Eden-chromeos-89004124a5-x86_64.apk) | Eden Build for x86 64bit android systems/ChromeOS |
| [Genshin Spoof APK](https://github.com/sharath-5br2r/my-patched-apks/releases/download/260031/Eden-optimized-89004124a5-arm64-v8a.apk) | Spoofs Eden as Genshin Impact, which may enable optimizations/frame generation on some flagship devices. |

name: Build No. 260029
body:
Built from upstream Dolphin closed PR `#14748`, merged with the
custom user data storage location feature (Scoped Storage / Internal Storage / SD Card).

This is an unofficial community build, not affiliated with the Dolphin team.

- **amd64**: For devices that use the amd64 (aka x86_64) instruction set; this is exclusively used by Intel and AMD CPUs and is only found on desktops.
- **v3**: For devices that use the x86_64-v3 instruction set or newer; this is found on Ryzen, Intel 4th Generation (Haswell), and newer.

### PGO

PGO builds usually perform ~10-30% better than standard builds, and are thus generally recommended for all users.

## Android

|--------|-------|
| [ChromeOS/x86](../../releases/download/260007/Eden-chromeos-89004124a5-x86_64.apk) | Eden Build for x86 64bit android systems/ChromeOS |
| [Genshin Spoof APK](../../releases/download/260007/Eden-optimized-89004124a5-arm64-v8a.apk) | Spoofs Eden as Genshin Impact, which may enable optimizations/frame generation on some flagship devices. |
